critiques.finding: Settings.tsx and Subscription.tsx do not import from @/lib/enums; tier names remain hardcoded in Settings ("Pro — active" / "Free plan") and duplicated in frontend/src/lib/plans.ts (name fields).
critiques.alternative: Wire getTierSubscriptionLabel(TIER.PRO) in Settings subscription card and derive PLANS[].name from TIER_SUBSCRIPTION_LABELS in a follow-up consumer refactor to eliminate drift.

critiques.finding: TIER_BUBBLE_IDS maps slug → Bubble id but no exported reverse lookup (BUBBLE_ID_TO_TIER) for adapter layers receiving Bubble option value ids.
critiques.alternative: Add TIER_BY_BUBBLE_ID if Supabase/API payloads carry Bubble option value ids, mirroring a future ENUM consumer pattern.
evidence: frontend/src/lib/enums/tier.ts

critiques.finding: ir/resolver.json lists bTIrT display_name as "pro__edc578" while TIER_LABELS uses "pro"; consistent with slug/db_value convention used in settings_tab_os but differs from title-case subscription labels.
critiques.alternative: Document in tier.ts that TIER_LABELS reflect db_value slugs and TIER_SUBSCRIPTION_LABELS are the human-facing subscription card strings.
